2606.14108.title: Numbers Already Carry Their Own Embeddings
2606.14108.paper_summary: We introduce Adelic operation-preserved embeddings (AOE), a training-free representation that captures both a number's real value and its modular (p-adic) signatures. This construction preserves additive and multiplicative structure by design, turning numerical input into embeddings that "speak in the language of mathematics." Unlike prior approaches that rely on task-specific retraining, AOE is plug-and-play and drops seamlessly into existing architectures. On algebraic combinatorics benchmarks, it delivers consistent gains including the first-ever perfect accuracy on the Weaving Pattern task-while suggesting a principled path forward for overcoming the long-standing "number problem" in AI.
2606.14108.paper_summary_zh: 我們介紹了保留運算的 Adelic 嵌入 (AOE)，這是一種無需訓練的表示法，能夠捕捉數字的實際值及其模 (p-adic) 簽名。這一構造通過設計保留了加法和乘法結構，將數值輸入轉換為「用數學語言表達」的嵌入。與依賴於特定任務重新訓練的先前方法不同，AOE 是即插即用的，能夠無縫融入現有架構。在代數組合數學基準測試中，它提供了一致的增益，包括在編織模式任務上首次實現完美準確率，同時為克服 AI 中長期存在的「數字問題」提供了一條有原則的前進道路。
2606.14108.author: Suhyun Bae et.al.
